RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: second lieutenant
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: The entry-level officer rank. A colonist who has been commissioned as an officer.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: first lieutenant
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A junior officer responsible for leading a platoon or serving as a staff officer.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: captain
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A mid-level officer responsible for leading a company or serving in a staff role.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: major
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A senior officer responsible for coordinating operations between multiple units.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: lieutenant colonel
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A high-ranking officer who serves as second-in-command of a regiment or leads a battalion.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: colonel
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A senior officer commanding a regiment or serving as a senior staff officer.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: brigadier general
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A one-star general officer responsible for commanding a brigade or serving as a senior advisor.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: major general
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A two-star general officer commanding a division or serving in a high-level staff role.

RocketsRanks.RankDef.label: lieutenant general
RocketsRanks.RankDef.description: A three-star general officer responsible for commanding a corps or theatre of operations.
